message:
test: cross-theme × cross-degradation visual regression matrix (2dccg.6.3)

5 matrix tests covering: results pane across Dark/Light/HighContrast ×
Full/SimpleBorders (with EssentialOnly no-panic), search surface across
same matrix, full 6-preset sweep at Full degradation, light-specific
regression coverage through NoStyling, and HighContrast accessibility
hierarchy preservation. EssentialOnly treated as no-panic-only since it
intentionally strips structural chrome.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
